label: The Measure Locker
description: The Measure Locker serves as The Rivet Oathwright’s secured storage room, built into the shop’s salvaged ashlar with a low brick vault blackened by years of forge soot. Shelving of riveted angle-iron holds bins of sorted fasteners, lock blanks, and bundled bar stock, each marked with civic measure tags and shop stamps for audit. A pegged rail displays interdiction placards and red-sealed scrap warrants, keeping suspect salvage segregated from licensed stock. The only work surface is a scarred tally table fitted with nail-holes for waxed cord, emphasizing inventory over craft.
